subject: EduBridge SMTP Live Integration Test
body:
Hi Test Parent,

Welcome to EduBridge Africa! Your account as a Parent has been successfully registered. Please verify your email using this link: http://localhost:5173/verify-email?token=4b4fe7c900b9cfb68b4417587139fbff

Best regards,
The EduBridge Support Team
error: Message failed: 550 You can only send testing emails to your own email address (zeerocodes@gmail.com). To send emails to other recipients, please verify a domain at resend.com/domains, and change the `from` address to an email using this domain.

subject: EduBridge: Session Escrow Secured
body:
Hello Parent,

Your session with Test Pay Teacher (₦100) has been booked. A payment of ₦100 has been safely locked in the EduBridge Timed Escrow Engine for the slot: Today at 3:30 PM.

Escrow details: https://localhost:5173/dashboard/billing

Thanks,
EduBridge Billing
